package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for request_dto_outside_transport_package: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Request binding structs that live in repositories or service packages instead of transport-facing packages.
type CaseRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackageDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackageModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackageRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackageModel
}

type CaseRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackageService struct {
    repo *CaseRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackageRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackageAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackage(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackageDTO) error {

    type CreateAccountRequest struct {
        Name     string `json:"name" binding:"required"`
        TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" binding:"required"`
    }
    var req CreateAccountRequest
    if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
        c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
        return nil
    }
    var model CaseRequestDtoOutsideTransportPackageModel
    if err := db.WithContext(ctx).Where("tenant_id = ?", req.TenantID).First(&model).Error; err != nil {
        return err
    }
    c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": model.ID})
    return nil
}
